task_text: Put together an agenda for next week's Q3 kickoff meeting. The meeting is 90 minutes and should cover the most important topics for the team to align on before Q3 starts. Save it as q3_kickoff_agenda.txt.

content.text: I'll create a well-structured 90-minute Q3 kickoff agenda and save it as a file right away!

input.content:
============================================================
           Q3 KICKOFF MEETING AGENDA
============================================================
Duration: 90 Minutes

------------------------------------------------------------
SECTION 1: Welcome & Opening Remarks (0:00 – 0:05) | 5 min
------------------------------------------------------------
- Meeting facilitator opens the session
- Brief overview of the agenda and meeting objectives
- Set expectations for Q3 alignment

------------------------------------------------------------
SECTION 2: Q2 Retrospective (0:05 – 0:20) | 15 min
------------------------------------------------------------
- High-level recap of Q2 performance vs. goals
- Key wins to celebrate and carry forward
- Lessons learned and areas for improvement
- How Q2 outcomes shape Q3 priorities

------------------------------------------------------------
SECTION 3: Q3 Goals & OKRs (0:20 – 0:45) | 25 min
------------------------------------------------------------
- Company-level objectives for Q3
- Team/department-level OKRs and key results
- How individual work ladders up to company goals
- Discussion: questions and clarifications on goal alignment

------------------------------------------------------------
SECTION 4: Priorities, Roadmap & Key Initiatives (0:45 – 1:05) | 20 min
------------------------------------------------------------
- Top strategic priorities for the quarter
- Overview of major projects and initiatives
- Dependencies, risks, and open blockers to flag early
- Resource allocation and capacity considerations

------------------------------------------------------------
SECTION 5: Team Norms & Operating Rhythms (1:05 – 1:15) | 10 min
------------------------------------------------------------
- Meeting cadences, standups, and check-ins for Q3
- Communication norms and tools/channels
- Any process changes or improvements taking effect this quarter

------------------------------------------------------------
SECTION 6: Open Q&A & Closing (1:15 – 1:30) | 15 min
------------------------------------------------------------
- Open floor for questions, concerns, or ideas
- Summary of key decisions and takeaways from the meeting
- Clear owners and next steps coming out of today
- Closing remarks from leadership

============================================================
TOTAL RUNTIME: 90 Minutes
============================================================

content.text:
The agenda has been saved as **q3_kickoff_agenda.txt**! Here's a summary of how the 90 minutes are structured:

| # | Section | Time | Duration |
|---|---------|------|----------|
| 1 | Welcome & Opening Remarks | 0:00 – 0:05 | 5 min |
| 2 | Q2 Retrospective | 0:05 – 0:20 | 15 min |
| 3 | Q3 Goals & OKRs | 0:20 – 0:45 | 25 min |
| 4 | Priorities, Roadmap & Key Initiatives | 0:45 – 1:05 | 20 min |
| 5 | Team Norms & Operating Rhythms | 1:05 – 1:15 | 10 min |
| 6 | Open Q&A & Closing | 1:15 – 1:30 | 15 min |

The flow is designed to move logically from **looking back** (Q2 retro) → **looking forward** (Q3 goals) → **how to execute** (priorities & norms) → **open discussion**. Let me know if you'd like to adjust any sections, timings, or topics!
